name: Urza's Legacy

draft.notes: US pack order: 11 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare. First set to include foils in boosters; advertised odds 1:100 cards. A foil replaces the last slot of a card of the same rarity (e.g. a foil rare replaces the regular rare).

sourceNotes: Small set printed in USA and Belgium. 36 packs per box. First Magic set with foils in booster packs (advertised 1:100 cards). Foil displaces the same-rarity card.
